name: Karin Miyoshi
description: A second year in middle school, and member of the Hero Club. She is an experienced hero who transferred into Yuuna and Mimori's class, joining the Hero Club to supervise the other heroes. Karin is depicted as a headstrong individual: stubborn, obstinate, and single-minded. She is very abrasive and finds it difficult when expressing her feelings towards others. However, she can't resist helping whenever someone is having trouble. She is rather self-confident and positive, initially believing her

name: Kei
description: A young woman whom Kaneda meets on his quest to find Tetsuo. She is a member of an anti-government organization that Ryu and Nezu are also involved in. Kei's role in the Resistance is important because she is completely loyal to its cause and to Ryu. She is strong willed and is the one to discover that Lady Miyako is an Esper too. name: Ken Ichijouji
description: Ken is the final member of the 02 Chosen Children, partnered with Wormmon and holder of the Crest of Kindness. At first the devious Digimon Kaiser, Ken tried hard to atone for his wicked acts and eventually is helped along the way by Daisuke and the others.

name: Komako Semenovich
nativeName: コマコ・セメノビッチ
description: __Height:__ 144 cm Chie's half-Japanese, half-Russian friend who often visits the candy shop with her. She has lived in Japan for a long time and thus, is fluent in Japanese. When Komako transferred to the school, she was bullied by the boys for her appearance, but the situation was handled by Chie and nowadays she's also friends with her ex-bullies. She calls the protagonist "oji-san".

description: Manigoldo shares some personality traits and the look possessed by the 20th century Cancer Gold Saint, though he isn't evil. Also, Manigoldo possesses three more techniques besides Praesepe Underworld Waves.

name: Mika Jougasaki
description: **Height**: 162 cm **Hometown:** Saitama Prefecture, Japan She is the older sister of [Rika Jougasaki.](https://anilist.co/character/71279) Mika Jougasaki is a fan of the gal subculture. Like any older sister, she and Rika don't always see eye to eye, and squabble on occasion, but most of the time they get along just fine. Mika really cares for her little sister, and serves as a bit of a role-model for her. Her experience as an older sister also shows itself frequently when it comes to interacti

name: Minato Mito
description: Minato is a photographer who also works at the rabbit shop Trois Lapins owned by his older brother, Itsuki. He and Itsuki were previously part of the wealthy Kirigaya family until they moved in with their maternal grandmother and adopted her surname. The collapse of his parents' relationship and their subsequent deaths in his childhood has traumatized him so that he cannot bring himself to trust in relationships.

name: Miou Aida
description: **Height:** 153 cm (5'0") Miou is very demure as a teenager, making her presence small wherever she goes. Her shyness extends to romantic interactions, particularly with Haruki; she doesn't make any overt gestures of affection to him, but she does show her love passively, like waiting for him so they can walk home every day. Aside from being shy, she's also very fragile; she cries when she thinks that Haruki may like someone else and bursts into happy tears when Haruki returns after seven years.
mediaTitles: Our love has always been 10 centimeters apart.
The Moment You Fall in Love

name: Nayuki Minase
description: __Height:__ 164cm Nayuki Minase is Yuichi's cousin, with whom he moves in with at the beginning of the story. She has always been in love with him (in Japan, such relationships between first cousins are not only acceptable but common) and must learn how to deal with these feelings, especially with the threat that he may fall for one of the other girls. name: Neon Nostrade
description: Neon is the daughter of the boss of the Nostrade family, who are part of the Mafia. She is a hyper but spoiled young girl, who enjoys collecting body parts (whether they are legal or not) as her hobby. She is constantly protected by many bodyguards by the order of her father. Neon possesses a prophetic ability, which she calls "Lovely Ghost Writer". While she herself does not realize this, it is a form of specialization nen. Her prophecies are 100% accurate and written in the form of a poem. Neo

name: Otoya Ittoki
description: __Height:__ 175 cm __Instrument:__ Guitar Haruka's classmate in A Class. He's a friendly and positive person who enjoys singing. He shares a room with Tokiya from Class S. In the anime, he stands up for Haruka when she was barred from taking the entrance exam due to being late. name: Ryuuzu Meyer
description: Ryuuzu was a half-elf who lived in the Sanctuary during the era of the witches, 400 years ago. She was used by [Echidna](https://anilist.co/character/129330/Echidna) in order to activate the Sanctuary's barrier. During Echidna's immortality experiments, she created copies of Ryuzu and tasked them with protecting the Sanctuary.

name: Satotz
description: A seemingly mouthless man, the appointed examiner for the first part of the Hunter Exam. He tests the examinees' stamina by leading them on an marathon of initially unknown length through an underground tunnel. Though he seems only to move his legs at a fast walking pace, the examinees are forced to run faster and faster to keep up with his speed. After they emerge from the tunnel, Satotz then leads the examinees through the Numere Marsh, nicknamed the "The Swindler's Nest", a swamp filled with

name: Shigure
description: A half human, half wolf beastman and one of Genzō's partners, Shigure is an extremely greedy and ambitious wolf girl who dreams of becoming rich.

name: Shounen Bat
description: The enigmatic figure the series revolves around. He appears as a grinning, baseball cap-wearing juvenile who travels on golden inline skates and attacks people with a gold-colored metal baseball bat that is curiously bent.

name: Tomoe Yukishiro
description: Yukishiro Tomoe was the eldest daughter of a samurai, a low-level bureaucrat who served the Tokugawa Shogunate in Edo. Her only sibling was her younger brother Enishi, who viewed her as a surrogate parent because of their mother's death shortly after his birth. As required by the Shogunate, she practiced Buddhism. She kept diaries to record her inner thoughts and emotions, which she found difficult to express more openly. ~! This reticence left Kiyosato unaware of how much she truly loved him. T

name: Yunxi Qian
description: She is the eldest daughter of Minister Qian Aotian and his first wife as well as the elder sister of Yun Shang. She is currently the wife of Lord Ye Wang, and was at first pretending to be her sister Yun Shang but was eventually found out by Lord Ye Wang. As a child, she was chased out by her own House because of her psychic abilities, which were viewed as abnormal and unlucky by most of her family. name: Abyss Razor
description: Second Fang of the Magia Lupus.

name: Aikawa
description: ~!Aikawa is one of Ai's several alter-egos. He's an easy going guy who loves good food and always stands up for his friends. However, because he shares a body with the psychopathic Kai, another one of Ai's alter-egos, anyone Aikawa gets close to tends to meet an untimely death. This is because anything Aikawa overhears Kai learns too. Even Aikawa's best friend, Risu, fell victim to Kai after he told Aikawa of his newly-discovered magical abilities.
